ip_intent.one_line_desc: Full duplex serial communication interface, supports bit rates of up to 1 Mbit/s
ip_intent.one_paragraph_desc:
Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter (UART) provides industry standard serial communication with external devices via two wires at a programmable baud rate.
Its full duplex design supports simultaneous transmission and reception, and flow control may be achieved using software handshaking if required.
To reduce software load, UART includes hardware FIFOs and supports interrupt generation when the FIFO level reaches software-programmable thresholds.
For compatibility with a variety of different targets and applications, the baud rate is software programmable and bit rates of up to 1 Mbit/s are supported.
The data format is restricted to 8 bits, reducing the complexity and cost, with optional parity for robustness against transmission errors.

param_list.name: RxFifoDepth
param_list.desc: Number of bytes in the RX FIFO.

param_list.name: TxFifoDepth
param_list.desc: Number of bytes in the TX FIFO.

interrupts.name: tx_watermark
interrupts.desc: raised if the transmit FIFO is past the high-water mark.

interrupts.name: rx_watermark
interrupts.desc: raised if the receive FIFO is past the high-water mark.

interrupts.name: tx_done
interrupts.desc: raised if the transmit FIFO has emptied and no transmit is ongoing.

interrupts.name: rx_overflow
interrupts.desc: raised if the receive FIFO has overflowed.

interrupts.name: rx_frame_err
interrupts.desc: raised if a framing error has been detected on receive.

interrupts.name: rx_break_err
interrupts.desc: raised if break condition has been detected on receive.

interrupts.name: rx_timeout
interrupts.desc:
raised if RX FIFO has characters remaining in the FIFO without being
retrieved for the programmed time period.

interrupts.name: rx_parity_err
interrupts.desc: raised if the receiver has detected a parity error.

interrupts.name: tx_empty
interrupts.desc: raised if the transmit FIFO is empty.

alerts.name: fatal_fault
alerts.desc: This fatal alert is triggered when a fatal TL-UL bus integrity fault is detected.

fields.name: TX
fields.desc: TX enable

fields.name: RX
fields.desc: RX enable

fields.name: NF
fields.desc:
RX noise filter enable.
If the noise filter is enabled, RX line goes through the 3-tap
repetition code. It ignores single IP clock period noise.

fields.name: SLPBK
fields.desc:
System loopback enable.

If this bit is turned on, any outgoing bits to TX are received through RX.
See Block Diagram. Note that the TX line goes 1 if System loopback is enabled.

fields.name: LLPBK
fields.desc:
Line loopback enable.

If this bit is turned on, incoming bits are forwarded to TX for testing purpose.
See Block Diagram. Note that the internal design sees RX value as 1 always if line
loopback is enabled.

fields.name: PARITY_EN
fields.desc: If true, parity is enabled in both RX and TX directions.

fields.name: PARITY_ODD
fields.desc: If PARITY_EN is true, this determines the type, 1 for odd parity, 0 for even.

fields.name: RXBLVL
fields.desc:
Trigger level for RX break detection. Sets the number of character
times the line must be low to detect a break.

fields.name: NCO
fields.desc: BAUD clock rate control.

fields.name: TXFULL
fields.desc: TX buffer is full

fields.name: RXFULL
fields.desc: RX buffer is full

fields.name: TXEMPTY
fields.desc: TX FIFO is empty

fields.name: TXIDLE
fields.desc: TX FIFO is empty and all bits have been transmitted

fields.name: RXIDLE
fields.desc: RX is idle

fields.name: RXEMPTY
fields.desc: RX FIFO is empty

fields.name: RXRST
fields.desc: RX fifo reset. Write 1 to the register resets RX_FIFO. Read returns 0

fields.name: TXRST
fields.desc: TX fifo reset. Write 1 to the register resets TX_FIFO. Read returns 0

fields.name: RXILVL
fields.desc:
Trigger level for RX interrupts. If the FIFO depth is greater than or equal to
the setting, it raises rx_watermark interrupt.

fields.name: TXILVL
fields.desc:
Trigger level for TX interrupts. If the FIFO depth is less than the setting, it
raises tx_watermark interrupt.

fields.name: TXLVL
fields.desc: Current fill level of TX fifo

fields.name: RXLVL
fields.desc: Current fill level of RX fifo

registers.name: OVRD
registers.desc: TX pin override control. Gives direct SW control over TX pin state

fields.name: TXEN
fields.desc: Enable TX pin override control

fields.name: TXVAL
fields.desc: Write to set the value of the TX pin

fields.name: RX
fields.desc: Last 16 oversampled values of RX. Most recent bit is bit 0, oldest 15.

fields.name: VAL
fields.desc: RX timeout value in UART bit times

fields.name: EN
fields.desc: Enable RX timeout feature
